description_long: This pedestrian adult is a young woman with a fashionable urban appearance. She wears a sleeveless crop top with crisscross straps at the back, paired with a high-waisted, short skirt featuring a bold checkered pattern. Her arms are covered with long, fingerless gloves that extend above the elbows, and she accessorizes with large round sunglasses. Her footwear consists of platform shoes with thick soles and ankle straps, and she sports long hair styled in a high ponytail. The overall look is trendy and expressive, suitable for a modern city environment.
description: A stylish young woman in a crop top, checkered skirt, long gloves, platform shoes, and sunglasses, with her hair in a high ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crop top, checkered skirt, gloves, platform shoes, sunglasses, and high ponytail clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the high ponytail, the thickness of the platform shoes, and the arm gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the crisscross straps of the crop top, the back of the skirt, and the full length of the gloves and ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the outfit, shoes, and hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top, high-waisted short skirt, long fingerless gloves, platform shoes, large round sunglasses
